# 🚀 DevForge

A Python CLI automation tool that helps developers quickly set up projects.

---

## ✨ Features

* 📁 Create project folders
* 🐍 Create Python virtual environments
* 🔧 Initialize Git repositories
* 📦 Install multiple Python packages
* 📄 Generate `requirements.txt`
* ⚡ Create starter files automatically

### Generated Files

* `README.md`
* `.gitignore`
* `.env`
* `main.py`

---

## 🛠️ Built With

* Python
* `os`
* `subprocess`
* `pathlib`
* `sys`

---

## ⚙️ Installation

### Clone Repository

```bash
git clone https://github.com/your-username/DevForge.git
```

### Move Into Folder

```bash
cd DevForge
```

### Run The Script

```bash
python main.py
```

---

## 📦 Example Package Input

```text
django,requests,pillow
```

---

## 📁 Example Project Structure

```text
project/
│
├── venv/
├── README.md
├── .gitignore
├── .env
├── requirements.txt
└── main.py
```

---

## 🔥 Workflow

```text
✔ Create Folder
✔ Create Virtual Environment
✔ Initialize Git
✔ Install Packages
✔ Generate requirements.txt
```

---

* Django/FastAPI templates

* Colored terminal output
* Automatic Git commits
* CLI argument support
